TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.title: Live Premier League
TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.subtitle: Chelsea v Manchester United
TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.description: Chelsea v Manchester United (Kick-off 8.00pm). Coverage of the top-flight match from Stamford Bridge. The visitors won the reverse fixture back in September in a game that was influenced by a fifth-minute red card for Chelsea keeper Robert Sanchez. The Spaniard took out Bryan Mbuemo as he was through on goal to leave the Blues with 10 men for the majority of the game as Bruno Fernandes and Casemeiro scored in the first half to give the Red Devils a two-goal lead. Casemeiro was sent off himself in first-half stoppage time but the visitors held on to win 2-1 despite Trevoh Chalobah's 80th-minute header.

TNT.Sports.1.HD.uk.description: Sale Sharks v Saracens (Kick-off 3.00pm). Coverage of the match from CorpAcq Stadium. The reverse fixture back in October saw the visitors run in 10 tries, including four tries and a penalty try for Noah Caluori, as they ran riot with a 65-14 victory. TNT.Sports.2.HD.uk.description: Bath Rugby v Harlequins (Kick-off 5.30pm). Coverage of the match from The Recreation Ground. The reverse fixture back in September was a high-scoring affair as the hosts came away with a 47-31 victory. The game was in the balance at half-time with Harlequins leading 17-14, but Bath scored five tries in 35 minutes to turn the match on its head and earn themselves a brilliant victory at Twickenham Stoop.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: Live: Inside the NBA
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: This Emmy Award-winning studio show, which airs following NBA telecasts on ESPN, is hosted by Ernie Johnson, with analysis from Hall of Famer Charles Barkley and NBA champions Kenny Smith and Shaquille O'Neal. It's a mix of highlights, interviews and hijinks, notably the verbal sparring sessions between the outspoken Barkley and his straight man, Smith. The show also welcomes various guest analysts throughout the season.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: What Would You Do?
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Using hidden cameras, host John Quiñones observes and comments on how ordinary people behave when they are confronted with dilemmas that require them either to take action or to walk by and mind their own business. Various scenarios are created that force people to make split-second -- and often surprising -- decisions, and variations of the situation (such as changing the genders, races or clothing of the people involved) are often featured to see if different reactions are elicited. Examples of situations on the show include a waitress being harassed by her boss, and a drunken valet trying to park cars.

Award-winning program anchored by David Muir, featuring unforgettable, character-driven true crime mysteries, exclusive newsmaker interviews, hard-hitting investigative reports and in-depth coverage of high profile stories.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: The View
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Created in 1997 by veteran journalist Barbara Walters, "The View" is a daytime talk show hosted by women -- including Whoopi Goldberg, Joy Behar, Sunny Hostin, Sara Haines, Alyssa Farah Griffin and Ana Navarro -- and each offers her take on the day's news during the opening "Hot Topics" segment. Later, the ladies welcome various celebrities, who join them in a chat or perform for the audience. The program also offers tips on beauty, fashion, diet and relationships. Known for their freewheeling style, the hosts are often lampooned in late-night sketches.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: Jimmy Kimmel Live!
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Emmy-winning funnyman Jimmy Kimmel serves up comedy bits and welcomes guests that include other comics, celebrities, athletes and musicians, as well as everyday people with unusual or compelling personal stories. Kimmel's family and friends take part in the festivities, including his Cousin Sal, Uncle Frank (until his death in 2011) and childhood friend Cleto Escobedo III, who leads the show's house band. Recurring segments include the FCC-pleasing This Week in Unnecessary Censorship in which they take TV clips and "bleep and blur things whether they need it or not," as Kimmel describes it. But it's too bad they consistently run out of time for Matt Damon's segment.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: Nightline
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: In-depth reporting on one or more of the major stories in the news, with occasional segments on pop culture; journalists Juju Chang and Byron Pitts share hosting duties for this late-night program.

HBO.East.us2.title: Zola
HBO.East.us2.description: Zola, a Detroit waitress, is seduced into a weekend of stripping in Florida for some quick cash -- but the trip becomes a sleepless 48-hour odyssey involving a nefarious friend, her pimp and her idiot boyfriend.

HBO.East.us2.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
HBO.East.us2.description: Abandoned by his parents and raised by an aunt and uncle, teenager Peter Parker, AKA Spider-Man, is trying to sort out who he is and exactly what his feelings are for his first crush, Gwen Stacy. When Peter finds a mysterious briefcase that was his father's, he pursues a quest to solve his parents' disappearance. His search takes him to Oscorp and the lab of Dr. Curt Connors, setting him on a collision course with Connors' alter ego, the Lizard.

HBO.East.us2.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2

HBO2.HD.us2.title: Inception
HBO2.HD.us2.description: Dom Cobb (Leonardo DiCaprio) is a thief with the rare ability to enter people's dreams and steal their secrets from their subconscious. Cobb gets a chance at redemption when he is offered a seemingly impossible task: Plant an idea in someone's mind. If he succeeds, it will be the perfect crime, but a dangerous enemy anticipates Cobb's every move.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Game of Thrones
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: The Iron Throne
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: After much turmoil and bloodshed across the Seven Kingdoms, the battle for the Iron Throne comes to an end, and the kingdom's true fate is revealed.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Mummy
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Man of Steel
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: With the imminent destruction of Krypton, their home planet, Jor-El (Russell Crowe) and his wife seek to preserve their race by sending their infant son to Earth. The child's spacecraft lands at the farm of Jonathan (Kevin Costner) and Martha (Diane Lane) Kent, who name him Clark and raise him as their own son. Though his extraordinary abilities have led to the adult Clark (Henry Cavill) living on the fringe of society, he finds he must become a hero to save those he loves from a dire threat.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: John Wick
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Legendary assassin John Wick (Keanu Reeves) retired from his violent career after marrying the love of his life. Her sudden death leaves John in deep mourning. When sadistic mobster Iosef Tarasov (Alfie Allen) and his thugs steal John's prized car and kill the puppy that was a last gift from his wife, John unleashes the remorseless killing machine within and seeks vengeance. Meanwhile, Iosef's father (Michael Nyqvist) -- John's former colleague -- puts a huge bounty on John's head.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: John Wick: Chapter 2
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Retired super-assassin John Wick's plans to resume a quiet civilian life are cut short when Italian gangster Santino D'Antonio shows up on his doorstep with a gold marker, compelling him to repay past favors. Ordered by Winston, kingpin of secret assassin society The Continental, to respect the organization's ancient code, Wick reluctantly accepts the assignment to travel to Rome to take out D'Antonio's sister, the ruthless capo atop the Italian Camorra crime syndicate.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 -- Parabellum
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: After gunning down a member of the High Table -- the shadowy international assassin's guild -- legendary hit man John Wick finds himself stripped of the organization's protective services. Now stuck with a $14 million bounty on his head, Wick must fight his way through the streets of New York as he becomes the target of the world's most ruthless killers.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Men
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Harper retreats to the countryside to be alone in the wake of a tragedy, but her unease at the town's leering and uncannily similar men grows into a fully fledged nightmare as her arrival awakens something primal in the forest.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Dark Wizard
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: The Death Consequence
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Dean Potter finds joy and escape through his early success at extreme climbing, where he connects with a community of like-minded people seeking the sport's freedom and adrenaline; Dean's restless energy compels him to pioneer new ascents and forge new world records, even while at times falling afoul of the establishment and struggling with personal relationships.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Batman
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Batman ventures into Gotham City's underworld when a sadistic killer leaves behind a trail of cryptic clues. As the scale of the perpetrator's plans become clear, he must bring justice to the abuse of power and corruption that plagues the metropolis.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Logan
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In the near future, a weary Logan (Hugh Jackman) cares for an ailing Professor X (Patrick Stewart) at a remote outpost on the Mexican border. His plan to hide from the outside world gets upended when he meets a young mutant (Dafne Keen) who is very much like him. Logan must now protect the girl and battle the dark forces that want to capture her.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: All Eyez on Me
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: The true and untold story of prolific rapper, actor, poet and activist Tupac Shakur (Demetrius Shipp Jr.), from his early days in New York to his status as one of the world's most recognized and influential voices. Against all odds, Shakur's raw talent, powerful lyrics and revolutionary mindset establish him as a cultural icon whose legacy continues to grow long after his death.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: O.G.
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Louis Menkins is in the final weeks of his 24-year prison sentence. Though he doesn't talk about it, Louis' nervousness about adapting to life on the outside is affecting every decision he makes. Chief among those is his choice to befriend a new prisoner named Tracy Beecher, who is facing 23 years for murder. Louis warns Beech away from gang life, and yet it soon becomes clear that such a feat is easier said than done.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Path to War
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: This film is a dramatization of the decision-making behind the Johnson administration's escalation of the Vietnam War in the mid 1960s. As Lyndon Johnson (Michael Gambon) agonizes over sending more troops to Southeast Asia, he is given contradictory advice from Secretary of Defense Robert McNamara (Alec Baldwin) and Secretary of State Dean Rusk (John Aylward). The president also attempts to build his Great Society at home, while balancing the war's increasing drain on the nation's resources.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Iron Jawed Angels
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Activists Alice Paul (Hilary Swank) and Lucy Burns (Frances O'Connor) take the women's suffrage movement by storm.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Spectacular Now
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: High school senior Sutter Keely is an effortless charmer and self-proclaimed life of the party who unexpectedly falls in love with the nice girl Aimee Fineky. While Aimee dreams of the future, Sutter lives in the now. And yet somehow, they're drawn together. What starts as an unlikely romance becomes a sharp-eyed, straight-up snapshot of the heady confusion and haunting passion of youth -- one that doesn't look for tidy truths.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Three Billboards Outside Ebbing, Missouri
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: After months have passed without a culprit in her daughter's murder case, Mildred Hayes makes a bold move, painting three signs leading into her town with a controversial message directed at William Willoughby, the town's revered chief of police. When his second-in-command, Officer Dixon -- an immature mother's boy with a penchant for violence -- gets involved, the battle is only exacerbated.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Euphoria
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: A group of high school students navigates drugs, sex, identity, trauma, social media, love and friendship.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Wuthering Heights
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In this adaptation of the classic Emily Brontë novel set in 19th-century England, wealthy young Cathy Earnshaw (Merle Oberon) shares a loving bond with Heathcliff (Laurence Olivier), a poor childhood friend who now works in her stables. Unfortunately, things become complicated when the affluent Edgar Linton (David Niven) decides to pursue Cathy, and Heathcliff leaves out of resentment. Though Heathcliff returns with a self-made fortune, he realizes he may have lost Cathy in his absence.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: The Dark Wizard
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.subtitle: The Death Consequence
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Dean Potter finds joy and escape through his early success at extreme climbing, where he connects with a community of like-minded people seeking the sport's freedom and adrenaline; Dean's restless energy compels him to pioneer new ascents and forge new world records, even while at times falling afoul of the establishment and struggling with personal relationships.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Fantastic Beasts and Where to Find Them
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: The year is 1926, and Newt Scamander (Eddie Redmayne) has just completed a global excursion to find and document an extraordinary array of magical creatures. Arriving in New York for a brief stopover, he might have come and gone without incident, were it not for a No-Maj (American for Muggle) named Jacob, a misplaced magical case, and the escape of some of Newt's fantastic beasts, which could spell trouble for both the wizarding and No-Maj worlds.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Alien
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: In deep space, the crew of the commercial starship Nostromo is awakened from their cryo-sleep capsules halfway through their journey home to investigate a distress call from an alien vessel. The terror begins when the crew encounters a nest of eggs inside the alien ship. An organism from inside an egg leaps out and attaches itself to one of the crew, causing him to fall into a coma.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Prometheus
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: The discovery of a clue to mankind's origins on Earth leads a team of explorers to the darkest parts of the universe. Two brilliant young scientists lead the expedition. Shaw hopes that they will meet a race of benevolent, godlike beings who will in some way verify her religious beliefs, while Holloway is out to debunk any spiritual notions. However, neither the scientists nor their shipmates are prepared for the unimaginable terrors that await them.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Smoking Tigers
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: Lonely 16-year-old Korean American Hayoung tries to hide her problematic family and lower-income background from her new wealthy friends.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Euphoria
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: A group of high school students navigates drugs, sex, identity, trauma, social media, love and friendship.

HBO.Signature.HD.us2.title: Angel Rodriguez
HBO.Signature.HD.us2.description: A pregnant New York social worker (Rachel Griffiths) tries to help a troubled teenager (Jonan Everett) whose father (David Zayas) kicked him out of his home.

HBO.West.us2.description: A few years after high school, Rue's debts finally catch up with her; hoping to finance her dream wedding, Cassie tries to become internet famous, to the disapproval of Nate, who's juggling the demands of running Cal's business.

HBO.West.us2.description: Comic/actor Ramy Youssef offers his thoughts on a number of subjects, including the best day of the week to pray, his father's immigration story and connection to Donald Trump, and his complicated love for LeBron James.

HBO.West.us2.description: Ramy Youssef returns to the stage to offer his unique reflections on a divided world, the unexpected perils of charitable giving, the 2024 presidential election, prayer, and a childhood book report that changed the course of his life.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Now known as the Dragon Warrior, Po protects the Valley of Peace alongside his friends and fellow kung fu masters, the Furious Five. However, a dangerous villain threatens Po's awesome new life with plans to use a secret weapon to wipe out the martial art and conquer China. In order to defeat the new enemy, Po finds he must recall his past and unlock secrets of his mysterious origins; only then will he find the strength to vanquish his foe.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Clear History
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: An angry man concocts an elaborate plan for revenge when his old boss visits the island that he calls home.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Starter for 10
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Brian Jackson (James McAvoy), a working-class youth from Essex, gets a chance to prove himself when he is accepted to respected Bristol University. As Brian navigates his way through his first year there, he finds romance with two pretty students (Alice Eve, Rebecca Hall) and tries out for a popular TV program called "University Challenge.".

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Eddington
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A standoff between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbor is pitted against neighbor in May 2020 in Eddington, N.M.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Spring Breakers
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: College students Candy (Vanessa Hudgens), Faith (Selena Gomez), Brit (Ashley Benson) and Cotty (Rachel Korine) are short of the cash they need for a spring-break trip, so they rob a diner and head down to Florida. However, the police soon break up the party and arrest them. The curvaceous quartet are unexpectedly bailed out by a drug dealer and aspiring rap artist named Alien (James Franco). Soon after, three of the four gal pals decide to join Alien in a life of crime.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Shadows
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A high school student exploring her independence on homecoming night is disrupted by her older brother and the shadows of their past.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The LEGO Batman Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: There are big changes brewing in Gotham, but if Batman (Will Arnett) wants to save the city from the Joker's (Zach Galifianakis) hostile takeover, he may have to drop the lone vigilante thing, try to work with others and maybe, just maybe, learn to lighten up. Maybe his superhero sidekick Robin (Michael Cera) and loyal butler Alfred (Ralph Fiennes) can show him a thing or two.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: The battle for NINJAGO City calls to action young Master Builder Lloyd, aka the Green Ninja, along with his friends, also secret ninja warriors. Led by Master Wu, as wise-cracking as he is wise, they must defeat the evil warlord Garmadon, who also happens to be Lloyd's dad. Pitting father against son, the epic showdown tests these fierce but undisciplined modern-day ninjas as they learn to check their egos and pull together to unleash the inner power of Spinjitzu.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Color Theories by Julio Torres
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: In his second HBO comedy special, Peabody-winner Julio Torres presents a helpful guide to understanding the world through his playful interpretations of colors.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: With their headquarters destroyed and the world held hostage, members of Kingsman find new allies when they discover a spy organization in the United States known as Statesman. In an adventure that tests their strength and wits, the elite secret agents from both sides of the pond band together to battle a ruthless enemy and save the day, something that's becoming a bit of a habit for Eggsy.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: My Blind Brother
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Bill has always lived in the shadow of his overachieving brother Robbie, an arrogant athlete and local celebrity who happens to be blind. After years of thanklessly helping Robbie achieve one goal after another, Bill finally catches a break when he finds a connection with the charming Rose, who is dealing with her own crisis. But when Rose starts dating Robbie, Bill must decide if he can finally put his own happiness over his brother's and compete for the ultimate prize.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Rooster
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: Angry, like an Angry Person
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: To avoid Walt's party, Greg dedicates himself to a student; with her suspension lifted, Katie considers one-night stands.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Marc Maron: Panicked
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Comedian and podcaster Marc Maron performs a standup act; he offers his nuanced perspective on our increasingly uncertain world.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: I Love You Forever
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Following a young woman into and out of an emotionally abusive relationship.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Practical Magic
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Sally and Gillian Owens, born into a magical family, have mostly avoided witchcraft themselves. But when Gillian's vicious boyfriend, Jimmy Angelov, dies unexpectedly, the Owens sisters give themselves a crash course in hard magic. With policeman Gary Hallet growing suspicious, the girls struggle to resurrect Angelov -- and unwittingly inject his corpse with an evil spirit that threatens to end their family line.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Friendship
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A suburban dad falls hard for his new neighbor.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Death of a Unicorn
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A weekend retreat has deadly consequences when a father and daughter accidentally hit and kill a unicorn while en route to find his billionaire boss, who seeks to exploit the creature's miraculous curative properties.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: If I Had Legs I'd Kick You
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: With her life crashing down around her, Linda attempts to navigate her child's mysterious illness, her absent husband, a missing person, and an increasingly hostile relationship with her therapist.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: This Is Spinal Tap
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: "This Is Spinal Tap" shines a light on the self-contained universe of a metal band struggling to get back on the charts, including everything from its complicated history of ups and downs, gold albums, name changes and undersold concert dates, along with the full host of requisite groupies, promoters, hangers-on and historians, sessions, release events and those special behind-the-scenes moments that keep it all real.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Documentarian Marty DiBergi follows estranged Spinal Tap bandmates David St. Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel and Derek Smalls as they search for a drummer and prepare for a reunion concert in New Orleans. Joined by music royalty Paul McCartney and Elton John, Spinal Tap wrestles with their checkered past to put on a show they hope will solidify their place in the pantheon of rock 'n' roll.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: The battle for NINJAGO City calls to action young Master Builder Lloyd, aka the Green Ninja, along with his friends, also secret ninja warriors. Led by Master Wu, as wise-cracking as he is wise, they must defeat the evil warlord Garmadon, who also happens to be Lloyd's dad. Pitting father against son, the epic showdown tests these fierce but undisciplined modern-day ninjas as they learn to check their egos and pull together to unleash the inner power of Spinjitzu.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Shadows
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A high school student exploring her independence on homecoming night is disrupted by her older brother and the shadows of their past.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Coastal Elites
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Five characters in isolation react with frustration, hilarity and introspection as they grapple with politics, culture, and the pandemic.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Materialists
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A young, ambitious New York City matchmaker finds herself torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Nine Lives
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Tom Brand is a billionaire whose workaholic lifestyle takes him away from his loving wife Lara and adorable daughter Rebecca. Needing a present for Rebecca's 11th birthday, Brand buys a seemingly harmless cat from a mysterious pet store. Suddenly, a bizarre turn of events traps poor Tom inside the animal's body. The owner of the business tells him that he has one week to reconnect with his family, or live out the rest of his days as a cute and furry feline named Mr. Fuzzypants.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Ferrell Takes the Field
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Actor Will Ferrell goes to five spring-training ballparks, where he plays 10 different positions on major league baseball teams in one day.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: House Party
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Aspiring club promoters and best buddies Damon and Kevin are barely keeping things together. Out of money, down on their luck and about to lose the roofs over their heads, they need a huge windfall to make their problems go away. They soon decide to host the party of the year at an exclusive mansion, which just happens to belong to none other than NBA superstar LeBron James. What could go wrong?

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Swiss Army Man
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Being stranded on a deserted island leaves young Hank (Paul Dano) bored, lonely and without hope. As a rope hangs around his neck, Hank prepares to end it all, until he suddenly spots a man (Daniel Radcliffe) laying by the shore. Unfortunately, he is dead and quite flatulent. Using the gassy body to his advantage, Hank miraculously makes it back to the mainland. However, he now finds himself lost in the wilderness, and dragging the talking corpse named Manny along for the adventure.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Sorry, Baby
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Something terrible happened to Agnes. But life goes on for everyone else. When a friend visits on the brink of an important milestone, Agnes realizes how stuck she's been, in this bittersweet story of finding your way after your world comes crashing down.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Date Night
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Dragged down by the daily grind, suburbanites Phil (Steve Carell) and Claire (Tina Fey) try to invigorate their marriage by visiting a trendy Manhattan bistro. They get more than romance when mistaken identity hurtles them into an incredible adventure involving corrupt cops, a mob boss and a crazy cab driver.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Wilson
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Feeling lonely and isolated, Wilson (Woody Harrelson) tracks down Pippa (Laura Dern), the ex-wife who left him 17 years earlier. She tells the neurotic and middle-aged misanthrope that he is the father of a teenager named Claire (Isabella Amara). Shocked, excited and hopeful, Wilson embarks on a madcap quest to connect with the daughter he never knew he had.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Shaun the Sheep Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: All is well at Mossy Bottom Farm, except for the fact that the animals will do anything to get out of work. So, Shaun the sheep and his scheming friends devise a plan to put their master to sleep. However, the ruse backfires when the poor farmer finds himself transported to the big city, having lost his memory. Now, it's up to Sean, Timmy the lamb, Shirley the ewe and the rest of the gang to travel to the metropolis and get him back, while not landing in even more trouble themselves.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Nine Lives
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Tom Brand is a billionaire whose workaholic lifestyle takes him away from his loving wife Lara and adorable daughter Rebecca. Needing a present for Rebecca's 11th birthday, Brand buys a seemingly harmless cat from a mysterious pet store. Suddenly, a bizarre turn of events traps poor Tom inside the animal's body. The owner of the business tells him that he has one week to reconnect with his family, or live out the rest of his days as a cute and furry feline named Mr. Fuzzypants.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Ice Age: Continental Drift
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Scrat's continuous pursuit of an infernal acorn has world-changing consequences for Manny (Ray Romano), Sid (John Leguizamo) and Diego (Denis Leary) when the continents split apart. The continental crack-up separates Manny and his friends from the rest of the herd, including Manny's mate, Ellie (Jennifer Lopez) and rebellious daughter Peaches (Keke Palmer). The pals are desperate to return home, but a pirate (Peter Dinklage) and his ragtag crew stand in their way.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Practical Magic
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Sally and Gillian Owens, born into a magical family, have mostly avoided witchcraft themselves. But when Gillian's vicious boyfriend, Jimmy Angelov, dies unexpectedly, the Owens sisters give themselves a crash course in hard magic. With policeman Gary Hallet growing suspicious, the girls struggle to resurrect Angelov -- and unwittingly inject his corpse with an evil spirit that threatens to end their family line.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: With their headquarters destroyed and the world held hostage, members of Kingsman find new allies when they discover a spy organization in the United States known as Statesman. In an adventure that tests their strength and wits, the elite secret agents from both sides of the pond band together to battle a ruthless enemy and save the day, something that's becoming a bit of a habit for Eggsy.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Materialists
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A young, ambitious New York City matchmaker finds herself torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Chris Fleming: Live at the Palace
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Comedian Chris Fleming bursts onto the screen with a fun and lighthearted blend of skillful storytelling and wild physicality in his first HBO stand-up special. A high-energy performer who seamlessly pivots from one everyday topic to another - from Trader Joe's to Oreos, NPR, and dog breeds - Fleming bounds across the stage as he shares his unique takes on masculinity, conga lines, and more.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: George Lopez: America's Mexican
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: The comic performs at the Dodge Theater in Phoenix; topics include immigration, modern children, interracial relationships and dementia.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Tour de Pharmacy
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Five competitors provide an inside look at the world of professional cycling and its checkered history with doping.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Rooster
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: Release the Brown Fat
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Writer Greg Russo arrives at Ludlow College to support his daughter Katie as her marriage begins to implode.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Rooster
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: Trousers
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: When Katie's future at Ludlow is thrown into question, Walt offers Greg a deal to keep them both on campus.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Rooster
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: White Whale
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Greg navigates his first day as a teacher at Ludlow, Katie deals with being suspended, and Archie assists Sunny in finding an advisor.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Rooster
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.subtitle: Cop Hawk
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: While relishing in his new fling, Greg offers Tommy a place to crash; Katie confronts the student behind some personal campus graffiti; Dylan impresses Walt in her new role; Sunny wrestles with a prestigious job offer.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Ferrell Takes the Field
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Actor Will Ferrell goes to five spring-training ballparks, where he plays 10 different positions on major league baseball teams in one day.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydia's life gets turned upside down when her daughter discovers a portal to the afterlife. When someone says Beetlejuice's name three times, the mischievous demon returns to unleash his very own brand of mayhem.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Spring Breakers
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: College students Candy (Vanessa Hudgens), Faith (Selena Gomez), Brit (Ashley Benson) and Cotty (Rachel Korine) are short of the cash they need for a spring-break trip, so they rob a diner and head down to Florida. However, the police soon break up the party and arrest them. The curvaceous quartet are unexpectedly bailed out by a drug dealer and aspiring rap artist named Alien (James Franco). Soon after, three of the four gal pals decide to join Alien in a life of crime.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The Switch
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Neurotic Wally Mars has one bright spot in his life: his friendship with Kassie. When Kassie announces her intention to become pregnant using a sperm donor, Wally thinks he will be the lucky guy, but Kassie has someone else in mind. While drunk at Kassie's insemination party, Wally substitutes his sperm for the donor's, then passes out, remembering nothing. Seven years later, Wally meets Kassie's son, who seems oddly familiar to him.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: This Is Spinal Tap
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: "This Is Spinal Tap" shines a light on the self-contained universe of a metal band struggling to get back on the charts, including everything from its complicated history of ups and downs, gold albums, name changes and undersold concert dates, along with the full host of requisite groupies, promoters, hangers-on and historians, sessions, release events and those special behind-the-scenes moments that keep it all real.

Joined by music royalty Paul McCartney and Elton John, Spinal Tap wrestles with their checkered past to put on a show they hope will solidify their place in the pantheon of rock 'n' roll.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: A Minecraft Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: A mysterious portal pulls four misfits into the Overworld, a bizarre, cubic wonderland that thrives on imagination. To get back home, they'll have to master the terrain while embarking on a magical quest with an unexpected crafter named Steve.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Rocket Science
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: High-school student Hal Hefner's (Reece Daniel Thompson) life is falling down around him. His parents have split, his brother picks on him incessantly, and he has a terrible stutter. Hal cannot believe it when Ginny Ryerson (Anna Kendrick), a pretty classmate, asks him to join their school's debate team. Falling head over heels in love with Ginny, he agrees to her request, with unexpected results.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: The battle for NINJAGO City calls to action young Master Builder Lloyd, aka the Green Ninja, along with his friends, also secret ninja warriors. Led by Master Wu, as wise-cracking as he is wise, they must defeat the evil warlord Garmadon, who also happens to be Lloyd's dad. Pitting father against son, the epic showdown tests these fierce but undisciplined modern-day ninjas as they learn to check their egos and pull together to unleash the inner power of Spinjitzu.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: My Blind Brother
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Bill has always lived in the shadow of his overachieving brother Robbie, an arrogant athlete and local celebrity who happens to be blind. After years of thanklessly helping Robbie achieve one goal after another, Bill finally catches a break when he finds a connection with the charming Rose, who is dealing with her own crisis. But when Rose starts dating Robbie, Bill must decide if he can finally put his own happiness over his brother's and compete for the ultimate prize.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Martin Lawrence: You So Crazy
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Filmed at a sold-out Majestic Theater in Brooklyn, N.Y., comedian Martin Lawrence delivers his first full-length stand-up special. Harking back to Eddie Murphy, the leather-clad comic riffs on drugs, jail, his impoverished upbringing with his mother and his luck -- or lack thereof -- with women. He also speaks at length about racism and the Rodney King ruling and subsequent riots. Lawrence even offers his unique perspective on how to maintain a successful relationship.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Materialists
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A young, ambitious New York City matchmaker finds herself torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Perfect Match
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Charlie (Terrence J) is a charming playboy who doesn't believe in serious relationships. His best friends bet him that if he commits to one woman for one month, he's bound to fall in love. Charlie accepts the seemingly easy challenge, but wasn't expecting to cross paths with the beautiful and mysterious Eva (Cassie Ventura). When Charlie coaxes her into a casual affair, Eva turns the tables on him, forcing the lifelong bachelor to question whether he wants more than just a one-night stand.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Fate of the Furious
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: With Dom and Letty married, Brian and Mia retired and the rest of the crew exonerated, the globe-trotting team has found some semblance of a normal life. They soon face an unexpected challenge when a woman named Cipher forces Dom to betray them all. They must unite to bring home the man who made them a family and stop Cipher from unleashing chaos.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Music Box
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Jason Isbell: Running With Our Eyes Closed
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Jason Isbell's musical evolution and creative process as he goes into the studio to record his album "Reunions" with his band, The 400 Unit; Isbell lays bare his childhood, struggles with addiction and relationships, funneling it into his music.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Music Box: Counting Crows: Have You Seen Me Lately?
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After their debut album's success, Counting Crows and singer Adam Duritz became global rockstars; interviews and 90s footage show how they navigated sudden fame while staying true to their art.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Music Box: DMX: Don't Try To Understand
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Focusing on a year in the life of Earl "DMX" Simmons, this documentary follows the late rapper through his 2019 comeback tour after serving a year in prison and uses archival materials to chronicle his struggle with addiction.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Music Box: Wizkid: Long Live Lagos
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Tracing the roots and global rise of Nigerian superstar Wizkid as he prepares for his first major stadium concert.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Alien
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In deep space, the crew of the commercial starship Nostromo is awakened from their cryo-sleep capsules halfway through their journey home to investigate a distress call from an alien vessel. The terror begins when the crew encounters a nest of eggs inside the alien ship. An organism from inside an egg leaps out and attaches itself to one of the crew, causing him to fall into a coma.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Aliens
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After floating in space for 57 years, Lt. Ripley's shuttle is found by a deep space salvage team. Upon arriving at LV-426, the marines find only one survivor, a nine-year-old girl named Newt. But even these battle-hardened marines with all the latest weaponry are no match for the hundreds of aliens that have invaded the colony.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Alien 3
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Ellen Ripley (Sigourney Weaver) is the only survivor when she crash lands on Fiorina 161, a bleak wasteland inhabited by former inmates of the planet's maximum security prison. Once again, Ripley must face skepticism and the alien as it hunts down the prisoners and guards. Without weapons or modern technology of any kind, Ripley leads the men into battle against the terrifying creature.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Alien Resurrection
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Two hundred years have passed since Ellen Ripley died on Fiorina 161. Aboard the medical research vessel USM Auriga, a team of scientists clones Ripley from her extracted DNA and removes the alien Queen embryo which was growing inside her at the time of her death.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: AVP: Alien vs. Predator
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: When the wealthy and ambitious Charles Bishop Weyland funds an expedition to Antarctica, he hopes to find a mysterious source of heat that has been detected. Led by a tough guide, Alexa Woods, Weyland and his team uncover a pyramid, but they also find malevolent parasitic aliens. Making matters worse, another extraterrestrial species, known as Predators, arrive to hunt the other aliens, with the humans caught in the middle of the conflict.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Aliens vs. Predator: Requiem
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Residents (Steven Pasquale, Reiko Aylesworth, John Ortiz) of Gunnison, Colorado, are caught up in the crossfire when two deadly extraterrestrial species bring their longstanding conflict to Earth. On the one side, nearly indestructible Aliens; on the other, a lone Predator whose mission is to wipe out all traces of the Alien infestation from Earth, no matter who gets in the way.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Alien: Covenant
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Bound for a remote planet on the far side of the galaxy, members (Katherine Waterston, Billy Crudup) of the colony ship Covenant discover what they think to be an uncharted paradise. While there, they meet David (Michael Fassbender), the synthetic survivor of the doomed Prometheus expedition. The mysterious world soon turns dark and dangerous when a hostile alien life-form forces the crew into a deadly fight for survival.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Alien: Romulus
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Space colonizers come face to face with the most terrifying life-form in the universe while scavenging the deep ends of a derelict space station.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Generation Por qué?
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A woman pursues her acting dreams in New York City while enduring her very conservative parents.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Fantastic Beasts and Where to Find Them
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The year is 1926, and Newt Scamander (Eddie Redmayne) has just completed a global excursion to find and document an extraordinary array of magical creatures. Arriving in New York for a brief stopover, he might have come and gone without incident, were it not for a No-Maj (American for Muggle) named Jacob, a misplaced magical case, and the escape of some of Newt's fantastic beasts, which could spell trouble for both the wizarding and No-Maj worlds.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Get Him to the Greek
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: An ambitious executive at a record company, Aaron Green (Jonah Hill) gets what looks like an easy assignment: He must escort British rock legend Aldous Snow (Russell Brand) to L.A.'s Greek Theatre for the first stop on a lucrative comeback-concert tour. Snow, however, has different plans. Learning his true love is in California, the rocker vows to win her back before starting the tour, forcing Aaron to pull out all the stops to get Snow on stage in time.
A time traveler risks his life to change the course of history and save the future of humanity.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Man of Steel
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: With the imminent destruction of Krypton, their home planet, Jor-El (Russell Crowe) and his wife seek to preserve their race by sending their infant son to Earth. The child's spacecraft lands at the farm of Jonathan (Kevin Costner) and Martha (Diane Lane) Kent, who name him Clark and raise him as their own son. Though his extraordinary abilities have led to the adult Clark (Henry Cavill) living on the fringe of society, he finds he must become a hero to save those he loves from a dire threat.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Megan Leavey
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The true life story of Megan Leavey, a young Marine corporal whose unique discipline and bond with a military combat dog saved many lives during her deployment in Iraq. Assigned to clean up the K-9 unit after a disciplinary hearing, Leavey starts to identify with Rex, a particularly aggressive dog that she trains. Over the course of their service, Megan and Rex complete more than 100 missions until an improvised explosive device injures both, putting their fates in jeopardy.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Born to Bowl
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: The Tournament of Champions
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: As the top bowlers arrive at The Tournament of Champions in Akron, Ohio, the future of the PBA Tour hangs in the balance.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Music Box: Happy and You Know It
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Featuring a colorful and charming cast and their toe-tapping songs, the film reframes children's music as a misunderstood yet vital cultural art form that influences how kids develop; it chronicles the unexpected paths artists take to embrace the creative freedom found in writing music that shapes childhoods.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Music Box: It's Never Over, Jeff Buckley
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A portrait of Jeff Buckley, whose voice, emotional sound and sudden death left the music world reeling.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Music Box
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Jagged
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: An intimate exploration of Alanis Morissette and her groundbreaking 1995 album "Jagged Little Pill.".

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Music Box
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Woodstock 99: Peace, Love, and Rage
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Unfolding over three blazing hot days and nights of nonstop performances and heaving mosh pits, a July 1999 music festival promoted to echo the counterculture idealism of the 1969 original instead devolves into riots, looting and sexual assaults.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Flight Risk
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A U.S. marshal boards a small plane to transfer a government witness to New York. As they cross the Alaskan wilderness, tensions start to rise as not everyone on the flight is who they appear to be.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Final Destination Bloodlines
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Plagued by a violent and recurring nightmare, a college student heads home to track down the one person who might be able to break the cycle of death and save her family from the grisly demise that inevitably awaits them all.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Sorry, Baby
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Something terrible happened to Agnes. But life goes on for everyone else. When a friend visits on the brink of an important milestone, Agnes realizes how stuck she's been, in this bittersweet story of finding your way after your world comes crashing down.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: This Is Spinal Tap
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: "This Is Spinal Tap" shines a light on the self-contained universe of a metal band struggling to get back on the charts, including everything from its complicated history of ups and downs, gold albums, name changes and undersold concert dates, along with the full host of requisite groupies, promoters, hangers-on and historians, sessions, release events and those special behind-the-scenes moments that keep it all real.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Documentarian Marty DiBergi follows estranged Spinal Tap bandmates David St. Hubbins, Nigel Tufnel and Derek Smalls as they search for a drummer and prepare for a reunion concert in New Orleans. Joined by music royalty Paul McCartney and Elton John, Spinal Tap wrestles with their checkered past to put on a show they hope will solidify their place in the pantheon of rock 'n' roll.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Mary Shelley's Frankenstein
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: As Viktor Frankenstein (Kenneth Branagh) is dying he shares a tale of gruesome terror with a sea captain. Viktor, using previous experiments by a brilliant scientist, was able to bring a creature (Robert De Niro) assembled from body parts back to life. Once he realized how destructive his experiments had become, he abandoned the creature and tried to live a normal life with his fiance (Helena Bonham Carter). The lonely creature seeks out Viktor and demands one of two things: a bride or revenge.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Bride of Frankenstein
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After recovering from injuries sustained in the mob attack upon himself and his creation, Dr. Frankenstein (Colin Clive) falls under the control of his former mentor, Dr. Pretorius (Ernest Thesiger), who insists the now-chastened doctor resume his experiments in creating new life. Meanwhile, the Monster (Boris Karloff) remains on the run from those who wish to destroy him without understanding that his intentions are generally good despite his lack of socialization and self-control.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Curse of Frankenstein
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Victor Frankenstein (Peter Cushing) is a brilliant scientist willing to stop at nothing in his quest to reanimate a deceased body. After alienating his longtime friend and partner, Paul Krempe (Robert Urquhart), with his extreme methods, Frankenstein assembles a hideous creature (Christopher Lee) out of dead body parts and succeeds in bringing it to life. But the monster is not as obedient or docile as Frankenstein expected, and it runs amok, resulting in murder and mayhem.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Mummy
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Practical Magic
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Sally and Gillian Owens, born into a magical family, have mostly avoided witchcraft themselves. But when Gillian's vicious boyfriend, Jimmy Angelov, dies unexpectedly, the Owens sisters give themselves a crash course in hard magic. With policeman Gary Hallet growing suspicious, the girls struggle to resurrect Angelov -- and unwittingly inject his corpse with an evil spirit that threatens to end their family line.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Music Box
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Juice WRLD: Into the Abyss
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The life and tragically short career of wunderkind rapper Juice Wrld; exclusive footage, unreleased music, and dozens of industry interviews that document Juice Wrld's struggles to navigate his rise to fame, his drug use, and mental health issues.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Music Box: Listening to Kenny G
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Saxophonist Kenny G speaks candidly about his musical background, his stringent work ethic and his controversial standing in the jazz canon.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Music Box
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Mr. Saturday Night
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The untold story of Robert Stigwood and how he amped up the disco era.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Music Box: Yacht Rock: A Dockumentary
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Chronicling the emergence and popularity of the West Coast, soft rock pop culture epitomized by musical artists such as Christopher Cross, Michael McDonald, Kenny Loggins, Steely Dan and Toto.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Judy
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Thirty years after starring in "The Wizard of Oz," beloved actress and singer Judy Garland arrives in London to perform sold-out shows at the Talk of the Town nightclub. While there, she reminisces with friends and fans and begins a whirlwind romance with musician Mickey Deans, her soon-to-be fifth husband.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Christy
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Christy Martin never imagined life beyond her small-town roots in West Virginia, until she discovered a knack for punching people. Fueled by grit, raw determination, and an unshakable desire to win, she charges into the world of boxing under the guidance of her trainer and manager-turned-husband, Jim. Flaunting a fiery persona in the ring, her toughest battles start to unfold outside it as she confronts family, identity, and a relationship that just might become life-or-death.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Atomic Blonde
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Sensual and savage, Lorraine Broughton is the most elite spy in MI6, an agent who's willing to use all of her lethal skills to stay alive during an impossible mission. With the Berlin Wall about to fall, she travels into the heart of the city to retrieve a priceless dossier and take down a ruthless espionage ring. Once there, she teams up with an embedded station chief to navigate her way through the deadliest game of spies.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Mickey 17
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A disposable employee is sent on a human expedition to colonize the ice world Niflheim. After one iteration dies, a new body is regenerated with most of his memories intact.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Joker
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Forever alone in a crowd, failed comedian Arthur Fleck seeks connection as he walks the streets of Gotham City. Arthur wears two masks -- the one he paints for his day job as a clown, and the guise he projects in a futile attempt to feel like he's part of the world around him. Isolated, bullied and disregarded by society, Fleck begins a slow descent into madness as he transforms into the criminal mastermind known as the Joker.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Joker: Folie à Deux
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Struggling with his dual identity, failed comedian Arthur Fleck stumbles upon true love while incarcerated at Arkham State Hospital. Awaiting trial for the murder of five people, Fleck soon discovers the music that's always been inside him.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Ex Machina
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Caleb Smith (Domhnall Gleeson) a programmer at a huge Internet company, wins a contest that enables him to spend a week at the private estate of Nathan Bateman (Oscar Isaac), his firm's brilliant CEO. When he arrives, Caleb learns that he has been chosen to be the human component in a Turing Test to determine the capabilities and consciousness of Ava (Alicia Vikander), a beautiful robot. However, it soon becomes evident that Ava is far more self-aware and deceptive than either man imagined.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: A Most Violent Year

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: One to One: John & Yoko
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Never-before-seen footage of John Lennon and Yoko Ono includes their concert performance at Madison Square Garden and their lives in New York's Greenwich Village.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Tina
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Never-before-seen footage, audio tapes, personal photos and intimate interviews provide insight into the remarkable life and career of legendary singer Tina Turner.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: David Bowie: The Last Five Years
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A detailed look at the final five years of David Bowie's life when he not only began producing music again, but returned to the core and defining themes of his career.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Wedding Crashers
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Jeremy (Vince Vaughn) and John (Owen Wilson) are divorce mediators who spend their free time crashing wedding receptions. For the irrepressible duo, there are few better ways to drink for free and bed vulnerable women. So when Secretary of the Treasury William Cleary (Christopher Walken) announces the wedding of his daughter, the pair make it their mission to crash the high-profile event. But their game hits a bump in the road when John locks eyes with bridesmaid Claire (Rachel McAdams).

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Monster-in-Law

Viola, a newscaster, has just lost her job and is feeling rather attached to Kevin, so she regards Charlotte as her new competition -- and will apparently do anything to make her son call off the wedding.

When Martin realizes the NSA men who approached him are rogue agents, they frame him for the murder of the device's inventor.

In Japan, Miyagi is surprised to discover that his old sweetheart, Yukie, has remained single. Meanwhile, Daniel is attracted to Yukie's niece, Kumiko. But romance must be put on hold while Daniel and Miyagi deal with local bullies and long-harbored grudges.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Armageddon
AMC.HD.us2.description: When an asteroid threatens to collide with Earth, NASA honcho Dan Truman (Billy Bob Thornton) determines the only way to stop it is to drill into its surface and detonate a nuclear bomb. This leads him to renowned driller Harry Stamper (Bruce Willis), who agrees to helm the dangerous space mission provided he can bring along his own hotshot crew. Among them is the cocksure A.J. (Ben Affleck), who Harry thinks isn't good enough for his daughter (Liv Tyler), until the mission proves otherwise.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Green Mile
AMC.HD.us2.description: Paul Edgecomb walked the mile with a variety of cons. He had never encountered someone like John Coffey, a massive black man convicted of brutally killing a pair of young sisters. Coffey had the size and strength to kill anyone, but not the demeanor. Beyond his simple, naive nature and a deathly fear of the dark, Coffey seemed to possess a prodigious, supernatural gift. Paul began to question whether Coffey was truly guilty of murdering the two girls.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Cast Away
AMC.HD.us2.description: Obsessively punctual FedEx executive Chuck Noland (Tom Hanks) is en route to an assignment in Malaysia when his plane crashes over the Pacific Ocean during a storm. The sole survivor of the flight, Chuck washes ashore on a deserted island. When his efforts to sail away and contact help fail, Chuck learns how to survive on the island, where he remains for years, accompanied by only his handmade volleyball friend, Wilson. Will Chuck ever return to civilization and reunite with his loved ones?

AMC.HD.us2.title: Forrest Gump
AMC.HD.us2.description: Slow-witted Forrest Gump (Tom Hanks) has never thought of himself as disadvantaged, and thanks to his supportive mother (Sally Field), he leads anything but a restricted life. Whether dominating on the gridiron as a college football star, fighting in Vietnam or captaining a shrimp boat, Forrest inspires people with his childlike optimism. But one person Forrest cares about most may be the most difficult to save -- his childhood love, the sweet but troubled Jenny (Robin Wright).

AMC.HD.us2.title: Days of Thunder
AMC.HD.us2.description: In the fast-paced world of NASCAR, a rivalry brews between rookie hotshot Cole Trickle (Tom Cruise) and veteran racer Rowdy Burns (Michael Rooker). When both of them are seriously injured in competition, the former bitter rivals become close friends. With Cole's spirits restored by a romance with neurosurgeon Dr. Claire Lewicki (Nicole Kidman), and Rowdy still sidelined by injuries, Cole decides to race Rowdy's car in the Daytona 500 against underhanded newcomer Russ Wheeler (Cary Elwes).

AMC.HD.us2.description: Slow-witted Forrest Gump (Tom Hanks) has never thought of himself as disadvantaged, and thanks to his supportive mother (Sally Field), he leads anything but a restricted life. Whether dominating on the gridiron as a college football star, fighting in Vietnam or captaining a shrimp boat, Forrest inspires people with his childlike optimism. But one person Forrest cares about most may be the most difficult to save -- his childhood love, the sweet but troubled Jenny (Robin Wright).

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Martian
AMC.HD.us2.description: When astronauts blast off from the planet Mars, they leave behind Mark Watney, presumed dead after a fierce storm. With only a meager amount of supplies, the stranded visitor must utilize his wits and spirit to find a way to survive on the hostile planet. Meanwhile, back on Earth, members of NASA and a team of international scientists work tirelessly to bring him home, while his crew mates hatch their own plan for a daring rescue mission.

AMC.HD.us2.title: I Am Number Four
AMC.HD.us2.description: John Smith (Alex Pettyfer) seems like an ordinary teenager, but he is an alien on the run from merciless enemies hunting him and the eight others like him. Always changing his identity and moving to different towns with his guardian, Henri (Timothy Olyphant), John has no real past and no true home. However, in the small Ohio town where he now lives, he discovers love, powerful new abilities, and a connection to others of his kind.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Ocean's Twelve
AMC.HD.us2.description: After successfully robbing five casinos in one night, Danny Ocean and his crew of thieves have big problems. Despite pulling off one of the biggest heists in Las Vegas history, the members of the gang have already spent much of the money they stole. Casino owner Terry Benedict demands that Ocean return the money, plus millions more in interest. Unable to come up the cash, the crew is forced to come together to pull off another series of heists, this time in Europe.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Expendables 3
AMC.HD.us2.description: Years ago, Barney Ross co-founded the Expendables with Conrad Stonebanks. After Stonebanks became an arms dealer, Ross was forced to kill him -- or so he thought. Now, Stonebanks is back, and he's on a mission to end the Expendables. Ross decides that the way to fight old blood is with new blood, so he assembles a team of younger, faster, more tech-savvy recruits. The battle to topple Stonebanks becomes a clash of old-school methods vs. high-tech expertise.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Fifth Element
AMC.HD.us2.description: The Earth is about to be destroyed by a huge ball of fire racing toward the planet. Cornelius, an old monk, knows how to stop the burning sphere with the help of Korben Dallas, a taxi driver and former secret agent and a woman named Leeloo.

Joining an expedition led by fellow treasure hunter Ian Howe (Sean Bean), Gates finds an ice-locked Colonial ship in the Arctic Circle that contains a clue linking the treasure to the Declaration of Independence. But when Howe betrays him, Gates has to race to get to the document ahead of his so-called colleague.

AMC.HD.us2.description: When a long-missing page from the diary of assassin John Wilkes Booth suddenly resurfaces, it implicates the great-great grandfather of treasure hunter Ben Gates (Nicolas Cage) as a conspirator in Lincoln's death. Ben's globetrotting quest to prove his ancestor's innocence leads him to a closely guarded book containing the nation's deepest secrets.

Fortunately, Daniel befriends Mr. Miyagi (Noriyuki "Pat" Morita), an unassuming repairman who just happens to be a martial arts master himself. Miyagi takes Daniel under his wing, training him in a more compassionate form of karate and preparing him to compete against the brutal Cobra Kai.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Ghostbusters II
AMC.HD.us2.description: After saving New York City from a ghost attack, the Ghostbusters -- a team of spirit exterminators -- is disbanded for demolishing parts of the city during the battle. But when Ghostbuster Peter Venkman learns that spirits have taken an interest in his son, the men launch a rogue ghost-chasing mission. The quest quickly goes awry, landing them in court. But when the ghosts turn on the judge, he issues an order allowing the Ghostbusters to get back to work.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Ghostbusters
AMC.HD.us2.description: After the members of a team of scientists (Harold Ramis, Dan Aykroyd, Bill Murray) lose their cushy positions at a university in New York City, they decide to become "ghostbusters" to wage a high-tech battle with the supernatural for money. They stumble upon a gateway to another dimension, a doorway that will release evil upon the city. The Ghostbusters must now save New York from complete destruction.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Sixteen Candles

Samantha pines for studly older boy Jake (Michael Schoeffling), but worries that her chastity will be a turnoff for the popular senior. Meanwhile, Samantha must constantly rebuff the affections of nerdy Ted (Anthony Michael Hall), the only boy in the school, unfortunately, who seems to take an interest in her.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Wizard of Oz
AMC.HD.us2.description: When a tornado rips through Kansas, Dorothy and her dog, Toto, are whisked away in their house to the magical land of Oz. They follow the Yellow Brick Road toward the Emerald City to meet the Wizard, and en route they meet a Scarecrow that needs a brain, a Tin Man missing a heart, and a Cowardly Lion who wants courage. The wizard asks the group to bring him the broom of the Wicked Witch of the West to earn his help.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Breakfast Club

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: El Yaqui
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Abandonan a un niño yaqui en un pueblo donde sus mayores fueron engañados para ser reclutados al ejército federal. Una prostituta se retira de su oficio para rescatar al menor y cuidarlo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La amante duerme en mi cama
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Román le exige a Sara que abandone su habitación porque Nadia, la empleada doméstica, espera un hijo de él. Tras 20 años de relación, la quiere sacar de la casa y que se separe de sus hijas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío al límite
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: En la cárcel descubrí que yo era la amante
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Marisol se entera, después de 19 años y de tener tres hijos, de que José está casado. Gabriela, su esposa, alega que ella es la amante y que ni a ella ni a los niños les corresponde nada.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: ¿Hotel o burdel?; Secuestro por la culata
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Anthony y Michael pierden la licencia para rentar su casa porque vecinos se quejan de la entrada y salida de gente. Hombre planeó su secuestro, su esposa quiere de vuelta el dinero del rescate.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Pillada y publicada; Matrimonio equivocado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Marisol fue pillada en la cama con otro, su esposo lo publica en las redes y ella lo demanda. Omar y Luis eran felices hasta que la madre de Luis descubre que Omar es el violador de su hijo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Siempre life
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Margarita desea dejar a su esposo y a su hija para alcanzar el éxito en "SiempreLife".

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Live: Béisbol MLB
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tercer juego de la serie regular de la MLB 2026. Atlanta Braves visita a Philadelphia Phillies. Desde el Citizens Bank Park, en Filadelfia, Pensilvania.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Todo por nada
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Detrás de un juego de traidores se oculta el verdadero negocio sucio, dan rienda suelta a la cacería final. Asesinan a parte de una familia y la venganza no se hace esperar.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mirreyes; Viola fácil
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Alexa perdió su restaurante a causa de la influencia de Joshua, un joven que actúa con aires de superioridad. Isabella asistió con su novio a un club de intercambio de parejas y la violaron.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Estafa al cuadrado; Bala peligrosa
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Juan pagó cárcel por droga y traspasó su casa a una hija; al salir se da cuenta de que fue estafado. Jorge mató a un hombre que sacó un arma en una biblioteca, pero solo iba a quitarle las balas.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Perdóname mamá
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Delia decide asumir la responsabilidad por la falta de su hijo Adán. Delia debe ir a la cárcel y dejar solos a sus otros hijos Gabriel y Lisbeth. Tras su sacrificio, recibe la recompensa que tanto esperaba.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Lo mantengo por mis hijos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Irma asegura que su expareja, quien se niega a trabajar desde la pandemia, la acusó de abandono, le quitó la custodia de los niños y le exige que los mantenga, aunque no permite que los vea.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Un ángel malo; C.I
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La hija de Angelina ve videos en Internet y un virus le dijo que dejara escapar el gas para ser un ángel. Por otro lado, Mike fue detenido por la DEA por transportar droga en su camión.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Fama injusta; Beer yoga
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Indira tenía un noviazgo con el hijo de Gema y cuenta que el chico era agresivo, pero hay dudas sobre su versión. Dora tiene un gimnasio de yoga, y en sus clases combina la práctica con la cerveza.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Hermanos por destino
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Dos bebés fueron cambiados al nacer en el hospital. Santiago y Andrés, ahora adolescentes, se enfrentan a una verdad que altera sus vidas y la de sus padres.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Un corazón para Raquel
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Raquel es una abogada de divorcios despiadada. Ella sufre un infarto y descubre que necesita un trasplante de corazón. Sus sentimientos cambian y decide abandonar su carrera.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mentir por seguridad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Joselito debe cambiar su rumbo y buscar ayuda internacional para recuperar su poder en el negocio del narcotráfico. Circe y Diego ya saben dónde buscarlo y lo acorralan. Babel tiene nuevo jefe.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Amigas y cuñadas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Adalid e Isabel quieren jugar para ganar un viaje, pero el tiempo las estresa. Por su parte, Carlos y Erick llegan para ganar un automóvil y siguen los consejos de la hija de uno de ellos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: A un minuto de distancia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Carmela debe salir de viaje y le pide a Berenice para que se quede con sus hijos, pero ella no aparece y Raquel, quien es parte de una red de pornografía infantil, aprovecha la oportunidad.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mentir por seguridad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Joselito debe cambiar su rumbo y buscar ayuda internacional para recuperar su poder en el negocio del narcotráfico. Circe y Diego ya saben dónde buscarlo y lo acorralan. Babel tiene nuevo jefe.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Actores y amigos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ángel y Rubén son actores de teatro y vienen no solo a ganar, sino a duplicar los premios. Raúl y Mauricio, amigos desde la secundaria, deciden aprovechar el premio para irse juntos de viaje.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Huesos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Silvana se siente atormentada por un sueño recurrente que resultará ser clave para enmendar una profanación que cometió hace un año, pero una ligera desviación en su camino podría impedirlo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Respeta más al difunto que a su madre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: María está desesperada porque quiere recuperar la relación con su hija, que se rompió tras confesarle que su padre fallecido la obligaba a tener relaciones con otros hombres.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Ese hombre no se toca
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Daniela quiere que Lizeth, ex de su esposo, entienda que Daniel ya no es su marido y que la relación se terminó, pero ella usa al hijo que tienen en común como pretexto para mantener el contacto.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Viviendo con Satán; Justicia para mi madre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: A Carlos le queda un año de vida y lo quiere pasar tranquilo, pero vive con un gótico sadomasoquista. Andrea quiere la custodia de su hermano para protegerlo de su padre maltratador.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Vientre prostituto; Mata sanos
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Óscar y su pareja alquilaron el vientre de Sandra para poder tener un hijo, pero ella es prostituta. Por otro lado, Farhad se dedica a la iridología y detectó que su esposa tiene cáncer.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi suegra me adelantó el parto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Luisa denuncia que su bebé está hospitalizado y corre peligro porque se le adelantó el parto tras ser agredida por su suegra Lilia, quien la acusa de mentir sobre la paternidad de su hijo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Al borde de la muerte
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Diego está desesperado por ver a su padrastro. Logra que Circe lo lleve hasta el lugar donde tienen a Joselito y a Augusto, allí sucede algo inesperado. Gavino planifica su salida de la cárcel.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mentí por amor; Falso fantasma
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ana pide la anulación de su matrimonio con Gilles, quien contrató extras que fingieron ser sus familiares. Además, desde que Beatriz se mudó a casa de sus medio hermanos cree ver fantasmas.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Previa Copa del Rey
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Atlético de Madrid-Real Sociedad
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Toda la información previa a los partidos que se van a disputar en la Copa del Rey. Noticias, estadísticas, análisis y los datos necesarios para disfrutar más de los encuentros.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Copa del Rey
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Atlético de Madrid-Real Sociedad
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: El estadio de La Cartuja acoge un año más la gran fiesta del fútbol español. Atlético de Madrid y Real Sociedad pugnan en Sevilla por el trofeo de la Copa del Rey, en una reedición de la final de 1987 en la que se impusieron los donostiarras en la tanda de penaltis.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Post Copa del Rey
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Atlético de Madrid-Real Sociedad
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Tras la disputa de los encuentros, es tiempo para el análisis. Este espacio desmenuza los partidos con las mejores imágenes, intenta esclarecer las polémicas y da la palabra a los que han sido los protagonistas sobre el césped.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: LaLiga
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Real Sociedad-Alavés
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: La solvente victoria sobre el Levante supuso un paso más de los donostiarras hacia posiciones de competición europea. Los de Quique S. Flores siguen intentando cerrar cuanto antes la permanencia con un exigente calendario por delante.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA VS
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: Jesús Gallego, Alicia Espinosa y José Luis Guzmán
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: LALIGA VS es una plataforma de LALIGA cuya misión es erradicar el odio tanto dentro fuera de los estadios, visibilizando y condenando todas aquellas conductas que no tienen cabida en el fútbol. Este podcast trae charlas entre referentes del mundo del fútbol y de otros sectores para hablar del odio en los estadios, empezando por el racismo, con personajes que cuentan sus historias en primera persona.

The event will be headlined by a battle for the vacant UFC light heavyweight title between former champion and second-ranked Jiri Prochazka and surging contender Carlos “Black Jag” Ulberg. In the co-main event of the evening, flyweight champion Joshua “The Fearless” Van defends his title for the first time against Tatsuro Taira
